title: RocketPD Instructor Detail

fields.label: Name
fields.name: rpd_instructor_name
fields.instructions: Optional display name. If blank, the post title or fallback instructor name is used.

fields.label: Authority Headline
fields.name: rpd_instructor_authority
fields.instructions: Main authority/dek text in the hero. Leave blank to use fallback copy.
fields.default_value: Rethinking teacher supervision, coaching, and evaluation so leaders can build trust and improve practice.

fields.label: Tags
fields.name: rpd_instructor_tags
fields.instructions: One tag per line. Leave blank to use fallback tags.

fields.label: Headshot
fields.name: rpd_instructor_headshot
fields.instructions: Portrait used in the hero. If blank, the fallback image or initials treatment is used. Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Primary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_primary_label
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Primary CTA URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_primary_href
fields.instructions: Can be a page URL or an anchor such as #free-resources. Leave blank to use the fallback anchor.

fields.label: Hero Secondary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_secondary_label
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Secondary CTA URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_secondary_href
fields.instructions: Can be a page URL or an anchor such as #professional-learning. Leave blank to use the fallback anchor.

fields.label: Hero Award Text
fields.name: rpd_instructor_hero_award
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Hero Stats
fields.name: rpd_instructor_stats
fields.instructions: Add the small hero stat tiles. Leave empty to use fallback stats. Rows with missing value or label are ignored.

fields.label: Authority Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_bio_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Authority Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_bio_heading
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Focus List Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_authority_focus_heading
fields.instructions: Small heading above the authority checklist. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Bio Paragraphs
fields.name: rpd_instructor_bio_paragraphs
fields.instructions: Separate paragraphs with line breaks.

fields.label: Focus Areas
fields.name: rpd_instructor_focus_areas
fields.instructions: One focus area per line.

fields.label: Free Resources Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_resources_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small badge above the Free Resources heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Free Resources Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_resources_heading
fields.instructions: Main Free Resources heading. Leave blank to use the instructor-specific fallback heading.

fields.label: Free Resources Body
fields.name: rpd_instructor_resources_body
fields.instructions: Short supporting sentence below the Free Resources heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the Featured Guide card appears.

fields.label: Guide Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label in the Featured Guide card. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_href
fields.instructions: True URL for the featured guide.

fields.label: Guide Primary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_primary_cta_label
fields.instructions: Primary guide button label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide Secondary CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_secondary_cta_label
fields.instructions: Secondary guide button label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Guide Deliverables
fields.name: rpd_instructor_guide_deliverables
fields.instructions: One deliverable per line. Leave blank to use fallback deliverables.

fields.label: Podcast Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the podcast card appears.

fields.label: Podcast YouTube Embed ID
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_embed_id
fields.instructions: YouTube video ID only. Leave blank to use fallback embed ID.

fields.label: Podcast URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_href
fields.instructions: True URL for the podcast link. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Podcast CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_podcast_cta_label
fields.instructions: Podcast card link label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Webinar Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the webinar card appears.

fields.label: Webinar YouTube Embed ID
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_embed_id
fields.instructions: YouTube video ID only. Leave blank to use fallback embed ID.

fields.label: Webinar URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_href
fields.instructions: True URL for the webinar link. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Webinar CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_webinar_cta_label
fields.instructions: Webinar card link label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog Enabled
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_enabled
fields.instructions: Controls whether the blog subsection appears.

fields.label: Blog Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label above the blog cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above the blog cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog CTA Label
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_cta_label
fields.instructions: Section link label. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Blog CTA URL
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_cta_url
fields.instructions: Internal or external URL for the blog section link. Leave blank to use /resources/.

fields.label: Blog Posts
fields.name: rpd_instructor_blog_posts
fields.instructions: Blog cards for the subsection. Leave empty to use fallback cards.

sub_fields.label: Placeholder Card
sub_fields.name: placeholder
sub_fields.instructions: Use for a dashed/coming-soon placeholder card with no link.

fields.label: Professional Learning Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_learning_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small badge above the Professional Learning heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Professional Learning Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_learning_heading
fields.instructions: Main Professional Learning heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Professional Learning Body
fields.name: rpd_instructor_learning_body
fields.instructions: Supporting copy below the Professional Learning heading. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Quote
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_quote
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Person
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_person
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Trust Attribution
fields.name: rpd_instructor_trust_attribution
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the instructor fallback copy.

fields.label: Related Experts Eyebrow
fields.name: rpd_instructor_related_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small label above related expert cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Related Experts Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_related_heading
fields.instructions: Heading above related expert cards. Leave blank to use fallback copy.

fields.label: Final CTA Headline
fields.name: rpd_instructor_final_headline
fields.default_value: Bring Kim's work to your district.

fields.label: FAQ Heading
fields.name: rpd_instructor_faq_heading
fields.instructions: Intro heading beside the FAQ accordion. Leave blank to use instructor-specific fallback copy.

fields.label: FAQs
fields.name: rpd_instructor_faqs
fields.instructions: FAQ accordion rows. Leave empty to use fallback FAQs.

description: Page-level editable fields for the RocketPD individual instructor template.
